item.summary: refactor(channels): move channel-flavored setup flags into plugin manifests (#112239) * refactor(channels): move channel-flavored setup flags into plugin manifests * refactor(channels): normalize manifest cliAddOptions formatting, drop changelog entry * fix(channels): dedupe channels add options by commander switch identity * fix(channels): let the selected channel's cliAddOptions win switch dedupe
